Appearances:
Plaintiff, Reginald Wise is present.
Attorney, Steven McDonald, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Stephen King, is present.
Attorney, Jennifer DeMarco , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Sandy McNabb, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-30-2010 is vacated.
